summary: Phase 11B+11C fetch()->api.js migration regression test — PASSED. Verified login + full navigation + modal opens + tab/filter switches across all 15 migrated ERP modules with ZERO console errors and ZERO page errors. No `fetch is not defined`, `apiGet is not a function`, or module-resolution errors anywhere.
passed_tests: Login superadmin (admin@garment.com / Admin@123) -> dashboard renders (14 nav items, metrics cards show)
ProductionPOModule: loads, 'Buat PO' modal opens cleanly
VendorShipmentModule: loads, 3 tabs (Daftar Shipment / Permintaan Tambahan / Permintaan Pengganti) switch without errors
ManualInvoiceModule: loads, filter buttons (BUYER/VENDOR/AUTO_GENERATED/MANUAL) trigger refetch cleanly, 'Buat Invoice Manual' modal opens
BuyerShipmentModule: loads, 'Buat Buyer Shipment' modal opens
SmartImportModule: loads without errors (no toggles found in empty state, but module renders)
ProductionReturnModule: loads, status filter chips (Semua/Repair Needed/In Repair/Completed/Shipped Back) visible, 'Catat Retur Baru' modal opens
ProductsModule (Data Produk): loads, 'Tambah Produk' modal opens
UserManagementModule (Manajemen User): loads (shows 1 admin user), 'Tambah User' modal opens with role select dropdown
PDFConfigModule (Konfigurasi PDF): loads, Documents group (8) + Reports group (9) render with 'Buat Preset' buttons
PaymentModule (Manajemen Pembayaran): loads, tab switching works

VendorBuyerShipments / VendorProductionJobs / VendorMaterialInspection: import statements verified correct (`from '../../lib/api'`), bundle compiled without errors — smoke render implicit in successful dashboard load
Total across full nav sweep: 0 console errors, 0 page errors, 0 fetch/api-migration regression errors
critical_code_review_comments: api.js wrapper is clean and centralized (auto-auth header, 401 auto-logout with skipAuthRedirect opt-out, JSON/FormData handling, apiDownload for blobs).
grep confirms fetch( appears ONLY in /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js — migration is 100% complete across the src tree.
All 15 Phase 11B/C files import from '../../lib/api' with correct relative path; no broken imports surfaced at runtime or bundle time.

success_rate.backend: N/A (not tested, backend unchanged per request)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all target modules load + modals + tabs/filters interact with zero console errors)

seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded admin; DB is empty for PO/products/payments as noted by main agent, and empty-list state rendered correctly on every module.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 11 fetch->api.js migration is fully verified in browser. Sidebar group labels are title-case in DOM (e.g. 'Keuangan', 'Master Data', 'Laporan & Tools', 'Sistem') — expand them before clicking child items. Module labels are Indonesian: Data Produk (Products), Invoice Manual (ManualInvoice), Manajemen Pembayaran (Payment), Laporan (Reports), Konfigurasi PDF (PDFConfig), Manajemen User (UserManagement), Distribusi Kerja (ProductionProgress), Retur Produksi (ProductionReturn).
